attempts.strategy: Iso-level naturality of hand-built tensorBraiding in arg 1: descend from canonical BraidedCategory.braiding_naturality_left through the _eq bridges, then Iso.ext + simp + rw[braiding_naturality_left_assoc].

findings.blocker: ONE residual braiding transposition after the hexagon split: β_a=β_{L^i,F} sits before the inner merge μ_{j,k} on LHS vs after it on RHS. True by whisker_exchange on disjoint factors, but the merge is nested F◁(L^i◁·) so whisker_exchange_assoc does not fire; `monoidal` cannot do braiding moves. ~5-15 lines from done. NOT a math gap.

attempts.strategy: Canonicalize both moduleTensorPowAdd sides to canonical β_/α_/bridges/μ keeping tensorPowAdd.hom OPAQUE (avoids LocalizedMonoidal/X.Modules comp-instance diamond; plain rw works, no generic-M _core needed). Then: (1) slide μ_{i,j} to F-side converting β_{L^{i+j},F}→β_{tensorObj L^i L^j,F} via braiding_naturality_left; (2) inject pentagon hp:=tensorPowAdd_assoc L i j k under F◁ via cancel_epi(hp') + a hand-built hgen eqToHom-slide; (3) convert to canonical β_{L^i⊗L^j,F} then split via hexagon_reverse (hhex); (4) commute β_a past inner merge then monoidal.
attempts.code_tried: apply Iso.ext; simp only [moduleTensorPowAdd, moduleTensorPow, ...]; have hp := congrArg Iso.hom (tensorPowAdd_assoc L i j k); ...; rw [hgen (add_assoc i j k), ...]; rw [hp']; ...; rw [hhex]; sorry
attempts.lean_error: monoidal leaves exactly one mismatch: LHS (β_ L^i F)▷j▷k before F◁i◁Tbc;F◁i◁μ_{j,k} vs RHS i◁F◁Tbc;i◁F◁μ_{j,k} before (β_ L^i F)▷(j+k); the Tab.inv/β_{L^j,F} prefix and Tajk/μ_{i,j+k}/TF' suffix already match.
attempts.insight: Full proof compiles through step (3) (rw[hhex]), verified via lean_goal/diagnostics. Diamond entirely avoided by keeping tensorPowAdd.hom opaque. associator_naturality_middle_assoc EXISTS and fires. hexagon_reverse is the correct splitter for β_{X⊗Y,Z}. Reverted to keep file sorry-free per no-sorry invariant; full script banked in task_results.
